targetServices.name: Cryotherapy
targetServices.competitiveContext: EvolvE ranks well for cryotherapy terms (positions 4–8 in Austin, #1 in Round Rock) and leads local independents in authority score; main threats are national chains Restore Hyper Wellness and iCRYO whose Austin location has closed.

targetServices.name: Cold Plunge / Contrast Therapy
targetServices.competitiveContext: 320 searches/mo in Austin; EvolvE not yet ranking for contrast therapy terms outside cryotherapy cluster, representing a near-term capture opportunity.

targetServices.name: Infrared Sauna
targetServices.competitiveContext: 210 searches/mo; EvolvE not in top 100 for 'infrared sauna austin' — a high-priority gap given the service is on the menu and the keyword is uncontested locally.

targetServices.name: Red Light Therapy
targetServices.competitiveContext: 210 searches/mo; primarily sought by biohackers; EvolvE not currently ranking for this term.

targetServices.name: Body Contouring / CryoSlimming
targetServices.competitiveContext: 390 searches/mo for 'body contouring austin'; EvolvE not in top 100; competing against med spas and national chains; before/after proof is the key conversion driver for this persona.

targetServices.name: Facials / Cryo Facial
targetServices.competitiveContext: Part of the aesthetics cluster alongside microneedling (880/mo) and HydraFacial (880/mo); EvolvE currently invisible for these terms; med spas are primary competitors.

targetServices.name: Massage Therapy
targetServices.competitiveContext: 'Massage austin' drives 4,400 searches/mo — the single largest keyword in EvolvE's menu; EvolvE not in top 100; highly competitive but wide open for a focused content and paid strategy.

targetServices.name: Lymphatic Drainage Massage
targetServices.competitiveContext: 1,000 searches/mo; EvolvE not in top 100; relief-seeking persona relies heavily on reviews and referrals; low competitive clutter for an optimized local page.

targetServices.name: Deep Tissue Massage
targetServices.competitiveContext: 880 searches/mo; EvolvE not currently ranking; competes broadly with massage studios and spas across Austin metro.

targetServices.name: Wellness Memberships
targetServices.competitiveContext: Recurring membership conversion is the primary revenue goal across primary personas; pricing clarity and intro offers are key differentiators vs. national chains with established membership models.

targetServices.name: Gift Cards & Intro Offers
targetServices.competitiveContext: First-timer and gifter persona discovers via Groupon, ClassPass, and social; intro offers are the entry point to converting one-time visitors to recurring members; ClassPass and Groupon are current discovery channels.
